title: SkillContract
description: Configuration contract for skill evolution behavior. Stored in manifest.json under metadata.contract.

min_feedback_confidence.description: Minimum confidence threshold for skill bank mutation. Feedback below this threshold is recorded as experience but does NOT modify the skill bank.

synthesis_threshold.description: When a skill entry has more than this many bullet points, trigger synthesis (compress and deduplicate).

path.description: Relative path to the managed file from skill root.

managed_files.description: Files managed by the skill that the evolution process may modify.

auto_promote.description: In standalone mode, whether to automatically promote skill bank changes without explicit confirmation.
